mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, address_id, total_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, final_amount, status, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{addressId}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, accept_time = #{acceptTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, id = #{id} WHERE id = #{id}
